race.description: Boots Hats And Heritage Showcase Hcp (C3)
race.comment: IT'S A TATA (3) last raced on 22 January when successful over 1200m at Tamworth. Progressed impressively last prep and should pick up where he left off. PLENITUDE (8) showed a glimpse of form last start when he closed well to finish fourth over 1200m at this track. Coming back in trip is the query but he should be strong through the line again. BOLO MISS (9) didn't measure up in a Randwick Highway last time but her form prior to that was hard to fault. Worth including here. MIDNIGHT RABBLE (12) is stepping out at this circuit for the first time. Last appeared when he scored over 950m at Moree on June 2. Must include in wider plays.
